questionHtml: State two reasons why future energy demands will be increasingly reliant on sources such as photovoltaic cells.
markschemeHtml:
«energy from Sun/photovoltaic cells» is renewable
OR
non-renewable are running out ✓

non-polluting/clean ✓

no greenhouse gases
OR
does not contribute to global warming/climate change ✓


OWTTE

Do not allow economic aspects (e.g. free energy)

meta.title: State two reasons why future energy demands will be increasingly reliant on sources such as photovoltaic cells.
